name: Rp Heroes and Villains
description:
Welcome to World of Heroes and Villains RP. Live your life as a businessman, a president, a police officer, a millionaire or a prisoner, or if you are lucky (or unlucky) to be born with powers, you can become a very powerful hero or villain, or just have a normal life having to endure the prejudice of being born as a mutant. NSFW and violence allowed!

New version of this bot. Just click here to see it.
